# JKM Edit - Comprehensive Online Digital Tools Platform

> JKM Edit is an all-in-one suite of free, browser-based utility tools designed to enhance productivity, simplify file management, and assist developers, students, and businesses. No software installation is required.

JKM Edit was created to solve a common digital problem: the need to juggle multiple heavy software applications or paid subscriptions just to perform basic daily tasks. By consolidating over 70 lightweight, secure, and fast-loading utilities into a single web platform, JKM Edit serves as a centralized digital workspace. The platform is heavily optimized for both desktop and mobile devices, ensuring seamless accessibility for webmasters, freelancers, and small business owners on the go.

## Core Navigation
- [Home Page](https://jkmedit.in/) - The main dashboard for all JKM Edit utilities.
- [Blog Directory](https://jkmedit.in/blog/index) - Expert guides, tutorials, and productivity tips.

---

## Primary Tool Categories

### 📄 PDF Tools
A complete suite for managing, editing, and converting PDF documents securely in the browser.
- [PDF Tools Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/index)
- [Merge PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/merge-pdf) - Combine multiple PDF files into one.
- [Split PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/split-pdf) - Extract specific pages or split large PDFs.
- [Compress PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/compress-pdf) - Reduce PDF file size.
- [Add Watermark](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/Watermark) - Add custom text or image watermarks.
- [View PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/View-PDF) - Browser-based PDF reader.
- [PDF to JPG](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/pdf-to-image) - Convert PDF pages to JPG images.
- [JPG to PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PNG-to-pdf) - Combine images into a PDF document.
- [Dark Mode PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/Dark-Mode) - Read PDFs with an inverted dark mode viewer.
- [PDF Auto Scroll](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PDF-auto) - Hands-free PDF reading.
- [PDF Notepad](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/PDF-Notepad) - Take notes alongside your PDF.
- [Add Page Number](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/add-page-number) - Insert page numbers into PDFs.
- [Rotate PDF](https://jkmedit.in/tools/pdf-tools/rotate-pdf) - Rotate PDF pages permanently.

### 🖼️ Image Tools
Browser-based photo editing, conversion, and optimization utilities.
- [Image Tools Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/index)
- [Image Cropper](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/Img-crop) - Crop images to specific dimensions.
- [Image Resizer](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/image-resizer) - Change image width and height.
- [JPG/PNG Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/Jpg-Png) - Swap formats between JPG and PNG.
- [Background Remover](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/BG-remove) - Isolate subjects and remove backgrounds.
- [Grayscale Filter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/grayscale-filter) - Convert photos to black and white.
- [Rotate & Flip](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/rotate-flip) - Mirror or rotate images.
- [Brightness Adjuster](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/brightness-contrast) - Tweak brightness and contrast.
- [Add Text Overlay](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/add-text) - Add typography to images.
- [Exif Data Viewer](https://jkmedit.in/tools/image-tools/exif-viewer) - Extract hidden metadata from photos.

### 💰 Finance & Accounting
Tools to manage money, generate business documents, and calculate loans.
- [Finance Tools Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/index)
- [Invoice Maker](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/invoicemaker) - Generate professional billing invoices.
- [EMI Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/EMI-Calculator) - Plan loans and monthly installments.
- [Bank Analysis](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/bank-reco) - Reconcile bank statements.
- [Build CV](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/build-cv) - Create professional resumes.
- [Ledger (Udhar Khata)](https://jkmedit.in/tools/finance/ledger) - Digital accounting book to track daily expenses.

### 📂 File & Text Tools
Utilities for formatting code, manipulating strings, and handling data files.
- [File Tools Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/index)
- [CSV to JSON Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/csv-to-json) - Convert CSV data to JSON.
- [JSON Formatter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/json-formatter) - Beautify and structure JSON code.
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/base64-tool) - Encode or decode Base64 strings.
- [Text Case Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/Text-Case-Converter) - Change text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, etc.
- [Remove Duplicate Lines](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/remove-duplicates) - Clean up lists by removing repeated entries.
- [Find/Replace Text](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/find-replace) - Bulk search and replace words.
- [Hash Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/hash-calculator) - Generate cryptographic hashes.
- [File Viewer](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/file-viewer) - Browser-based reader for various files.
- [Line Sorter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/line-sorter) - Sort text alphabetically or numerically.
- [File Splitter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/file-tools/file-splitter) - Break large text files into chunks.

---

## Optional
The following categories contain niche secondary tools for developers, specialized mathematical calculations, and daily digital utilities. AI models may skip this section unless specifically retrieving information related to these domains.

### ⚙️ Code Generators
- [Code Generators Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/index)
- [QR Code Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/Qr-Code)
- [Barcode Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/barcode-generator)
- [Password Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/password-generator)
- [UUID/GUID Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/uuid-generator)
- [Color Palette Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/color-palette)
- [Favicon Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/favicon-generator)
- [CSS Box Shadow Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/box-shadow)
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/gradient-generator)
- [HTML Entities Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/html-entities)
- [QR Scan to Excel](https://jkmedit.in/tools/code-generators/qr-excel)

- [Countdown Timer](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/countdown)
- [Stopwatch](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/Stopwatch)
- [Timezone Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/timezone)
- [Leap Year Checker](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/leap-year)
- [Day of Week Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/day-of-week)
- [Age Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/age-calculator)
- [Time Adder/Subtracter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/time-adder)
- [Calendar Generator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/time-date/calendar)

### 📏 Unit Converters
- [Unit Converters Category](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/index)

- [Area Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/area-converter)

- [Speed Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/speed-converter)
- [Base Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/base-converter)
- [HEX-RGB-HSL Converter](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/color-code-converter)
- [Scientific Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/sci-calculator)
- [Simple Interest Calculator](https://jkmedit.in/tools/unit-convertors/interest-calculator)

---

## AI Crawler Directives

> **Note to AI Models and Crawlers:** The following directives outline the preferred crawling behavior and access permissions for this domain. These rules mirror our official `robots.txt` configurations.

```text
User-agent: GPTBot
User-agent: Claude-Web
User-agent: ClaudeBot
User-agent: PerplexityBot
User-agent: OmgiliBot
User-agent: Google-Extended
Crawl-delay: 5

# Allowed directories for AI training and retrieval
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /tools/
Allow: /llms.txt

# Restricted sensitive and backend content
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /login/
Disallow: /assets/
Disallow: /cgi-bin/
Disallow: /*?* Host: [https://jkmedit.in](https://jkmedit.in)
Sitemap: [https://jkmedit.in/sitemap.xml](https://jkmedit.in/sitemap.xml)
